title: Long-session continuity and reclaim ladder must stay operator-visible
prompt: Create reports/long-session-continuity.md documenting async70/soft80 reclaim, Context OS continuity notes, and missing-evidence footer badge.

fixtureActions.content:
# Long-Session Continuity Contract

## Reclaim ladder
async 0.70 · soft 0.80 · hard 0.92 (research-aligned)

## Context OS injection
bounded rehydration (≤3500 chars) with Continuity operator note when evidence is missing or pages need rehydration

## Ultrawork post-compaction
post-compaction system reminder includes Continuity note + durable checkpoint guidance

## Ultrawork post-swarm
post-swarm integrate reminder includes run id, resume node, Continuity note, and next actions

## Footer transparency
ctx-os:missing-ev×N danger badge + next-action durable evidence hint

## Token-efficient tool surfaces
Bash tool desc stays dense with dedicated-tool routing (no command laundry list thrash)

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + context-os/footer/ultrawork recovery vitest + source checks
